title: MUTUAL AID LOCKERS - 211info
text: ALWAYS HERE BOOKSTORE MUTUAL AID LOCKERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mutual aid lockers that provide supplies such as gender-affirming gear (chest binders, bras), informational pamphlets on how to safely use gender-affirming clothes, socks and underwear, makeup, menstrual products, Narcan, contraception, (including emergency contraception), and hand sanitizer. Also occasionally offers trans tape, breast forms, tucking underwear, and other trans shapeware. Supplies availability is dependent on donations. 4555 N Williams Avenue Portland, OR 97217 Eligibility: Individuals in the LGBTQIA+ community Hours: Wednesday-Sunday 11am-6pm Email (503) 208-4799 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 208-4799 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Email or call for more information. Phone messages will be returned via text. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Short walk from stops along the #4 and #6 bus lines (plus others that run less frequently). The Yellow Line stop at Prescott Street is the closest transit stop if traveling via the MAX. The remaining walk, bike, or rideshare is about a mile. Services: General Clothing Provision * LGBTQ2+ Individuals General Clothing Provision * LGBTQ2+ Youth LGBTQ2+ Community Centers Personal/Grooming Supplies * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Personal/Grooming Supplies * LGBTQ2+ Youth Safe Sex Supplies * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Safe Sex Supplies * LGBTQ2+ Youth Transgender Body Image Resources If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALWAYS HERE BOOKSTORE
